## Tasks Summary

| Task | Change | Files | What it does |
|------|--------|-------|-------------|
| **1** (tdd) | New `continuity-reader.ts` + test | 2 files | Fire-and-forget enrichment helper: `enrichContinuityWithTracker()` + `enrichContinuityListWithTracker()` â€” reads child records via `resolveSessionFile`, merges lifecycle/pendingNotifications/compactionCheckpoint over continuity data |

| **3** | Redirect delegation reader | 1 file | `readDelegationsForSession()` in `hivemind-session-view.ts` â€” tries `resolveSessionFile` first, falls back to `delegations.json` |
| **4** | Enrich notification replay | 1 file | `plugin.ts`: imports `enrichContinuityListWithTracker`, passes `projectDirectory` to `replayPendingDelegationNotifications()`, enriches continuity records before iterating |
| **5** | Enrich hooks | 3 files | Adds `projectDirectory` to `HookDependencies` / `projectRoot` to `ToolGuardDependencies`. Both `session-hooks.ts` (event + compacting hooks at L151/L308) and `tool-guard-hooks.ts` (L193) enrich `getSessionContinuity()` calls |
